message:
test(conformance): add 37 negative tests for unsupported extension behaviors (bd-icjb)

Tests cover all registration API validation error paths:
- Load spec validation (nonexistent path, root path, dir without entrypoint)
- Module loading errors (non-function export, syntax error, throw during init, empty file)
- registerTool: spec not object, missing name, empty name, execute not function
- registerCommand: empty name, spec not object, handler not function, missing handler
- registerProvider: empty id, spec not object, streamSimple not function, missing api
- registerShortcut: spec not object, handler not function, reserved key (ctrl+c)
- registerMessageRenderer: empty type, renderer not function
- registerFlag: empty name, spec not object
- on/registerHook: empty event name, handler not function
- Module require: nonexistent module
- Runtime errors: nonexistent tool exec, tool throws, command throws, event throws
- Error ordering: first registration error stops loading
- Positive controls: clean shutdown, multiple valid registrations, undefined property

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
